company: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.
intended_use: uAI EasyTriage-Rib is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software device for analysis of CT chest images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologi
intended_use_full: uAI EasyTriage-Rib is a radiological computer-assisted triage and notification software device for analysis of CT chest images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and prioritizing trauma studies with suspected positive findings of multiple (3 or more) acute rib fracture(s).
target_condition: Multiple (3 or more) acute rib fractures
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated; reference standard for acute rib fractures inferred from clinical annotation
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: average 69.56 seconds for uAI EasyTriage-Rib (76 true positive studies) compared to predicate device HealthVCF average 61.36 seconds
